description: Composition Blue sleeveless kurta made of a blended fabric, has a mandarin collar and a round slit neck, bead embellished yoke, silver lines running down the length of the kurta, and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent A perfect blend of the ethnic and modern, this kurta from aneri comes with a heavily beaded yoke that makes it a perfect wear for ethnic ceelebrations. The silver lines add a mild bling to the garment. Team it with a matching legging, dupatta made of sheer, bead embellished heeled sandals and classsy earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
